input.question: How many evaluations were submitted for each course?

payload.question: How many evaluations were submitted for each course?

output.sql:
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, COUNT(e.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN evaluations e ON e.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY evaluation_count DESC;

visualization.title: Evaluations Submitted per Course

payload.sql:
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, COUNT(e.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN evaluations e ON e.course_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY evaluation_count DESC;
